|desc={{p|Dolliv}} is Brassius's first known Pokémon. It is often seen with him and has a habit of spraying out olive oil when surprised or happy. It reappeared in ''[[HZ048|Sparkle! The Glow of Flame and Art]]''.

In ''[[HZ055|Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four]]'', Brassius used Dolliv in his match against [[Hassel]], where it teamed up with [[Roy's Fuecoco]] to battle {{p|Baxcalibur}} and {{p|Flapple}}, only to be defeated.

During the [[Elite Four Tag Battle]], Dolliv proved to be an extremely powerful and versatile Pokémon in battle, serving as support for Fuecoco while battling on equal terms even with the type disadvantage against fully evolved Pokémon.

Dolliv's known moves are {{m|Seed Bomb}}, {{m|Helping Hand}}, {{m|Grass Knot}}, and {{m|Energy Ball}}.}}

|vajp=Tatsuki Kobe
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Sudowoodo}} is Brassius's second known Pokémon. It is capable of {{Tera}}stallizing into a {{t|Grass}} type. Brassius used it in his battle against [[Roy]] and his {{TP|Roy|Fuecoco}}. Despite Fuecoco learning {{m|Stomping Tantrum}} during the battle, Sudowoodo was still able to defeat it after Terastallizing.

In ''[[HZ048|Sparkle! The Glow of Flame and Art]]'', Sudowoodo was used to battle Roy and his Fuecoco a second time for his [[Tera Training]] test, only to be defeated.

Sudowoodo's known moves are {{m|Rock Throw}}, {{m|Substitute}}, {{m|Taunt}}, {{m|Trailblaze}}, and {{m|Stone Edge}}.}}
